mapping_description: Mappin to fetch the records from MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTIONS

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SMCT.TRANSACTION_ID,                
SMCT.CONSUMPTION_RELEASE_ID,        
SMCT.CONSUMPTION_PO_HEADER_ID,      
SMCT.CONSUMPTION_PROCESSED_FLAG,    
SMCT.REQUEST_ID,                    
SMCT.CREATED_BY,                    
SMCT.PROGRAM_APPLICATION_ID,        
SMCT.CREATION_DATE,                 
SMCT.PROGRAM_ID,                    
SMCT.LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
SMCT.PROGRAM_UPDATE_DATE,           
SMCT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
SMCT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN ,            
SMCT.NET_QTY ,                      
SMCT.BATCH_ID,                      
SMCT.RATE  ,                        
SMCT.RATE_TYPE ,                    
SMCT.TAX_CODE_ID ,                  
SMCT.TAX_RATE ,                     
SMCT.ERROR_CODE  ,                  
SMCT.RECOVERABLE_TAX ,              
SMCT.NON_RECOVERABLE_TAX,           
SMCT.TAX_RECOVERY_RATE ,            
SMCT.PARENT_TRANSACTION_ID,         
SMCT.CHARGE_ACCOUNT_ID,             
SMCT.VARIANCE_ACCOUNT_ID  ,         
SMCT.GLOBAL_AGREEMENT_FLAG ,        
SMCT.NEED_BY_DATE,                  
SMCT.ERROR_EXPLANATION ,            
SMCT.SECONDARY_NET_QTY ,            
SMCT.BLANKET_PRICE ,                
SMCT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID,            
SMCT.INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF  ,  
SMCT.TRANSACTION_SOURCE_ID,         
SMCT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,             
SMCT.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID,            
SMCT.ORGANIZATION_ID,               
SMCT.OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID,        
SMCT.TRANSACTION_DATE,              
SMCT.GLOBAL_NAME,                   
SMCT.CREATE_DATETIME ,              
SMCT.ACTION_CD ,                    
SMCT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME ,           
SMCT.REFRESH_DATETIME,              
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE                
FROM $$STGDB.ST_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX SMCT
WHERE NOT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION WCT
WHERE WCT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMCT.TRANSACTION_ID)

SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY STMCT.TRANSACTION_ID) + MAX_KEY.CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY,
STMCT.TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
'CG' AS SS_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX  STMCT ,
(SELECT COALESCE( MAX(CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY),0) CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION) MAX_KEY
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION SMCT
WHERE  SMCT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = STMCT.TRANSACTION_ID
AND SS_CD ='CG'
)

SELECT 
SCT.CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY AS CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
NMT.MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY       AS MATERIAL_TRANSACTION_KEY, 
NPOSD.PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY    AS PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION_KEY, 
NII_PREV.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY        AS  PREVIOUS_OWNER_INVNTY_ORG_KEY, 
NII_PREV.ITEM_KEY  AS ITEM_KEY, 
ENGLA.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY  AS  ACCRUAL_GNRL_LEDGER_ACCT_KEY, 
COALESCE(NAPVSP.AP_VENDOR_SITE_PARTY_KEY,-999)        AS  NEW_OWNER_INVNTY_ORG_KEY,  
COALESCE(NCWP.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,-999)   AS CREATED_BY_CSCO_WRKR_PTY_KEY, 
CREATION_DATE AS CREATE_DT, 
LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS LAST_UPDATE_DT, 
COALESCE(SMCT.NET_QTY,0) AS CONSUMPTION_NET_QTY, 
COALESCE(BLANKET_PRICE,0) AS BLANKET_USD_PRICE, 
COALESCE(CONSUMPTION_PROCESSED_FLAG,'N') AS CONSUMPTION_PROCESSED_FLG, 
COALESCE(INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF,'UNKNOWN')  AS SOURCE_REPORTED_PO_NUM, 
TRANSACTION_DATE AS TRANSACTION_DT, 
TRANSACTION_ID AS SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT, 
'CG' AS SS_CD, 
'I' ACTION_CODE, 
(CASE WHEN NCT.CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END) AS DML_TYPE
FROM
(
SELECT 
ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID                                 
,BLANKET_PRICE                            
,CONSUMPTION_PROCESSED_FLAG                             
,CREATION_DATE                                    
,GLOBAL_AGREEMENT_FLAG         
,INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF    
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                                        
,NET_QTY                                  
,ORGANIZATION_ID               
,OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID                 
,PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID                                                                                                                            
,TAX_RECOVERY_RATE             
,TRANSACTION_DATE              
,TRANSACTION_ID            
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE           
,CREATED_BY              
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX 
WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT 
ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID                                 
,BLANKET_PRICE                            
,CONSUMPTION_PROCESSED_FLAG                             
,CREATION_DATE                                    
,GLOBAL_AGREEMENT_FLAG         
,INTERFACE_DISTRIBUTION_REF    
,INVENTORY_ITEM_ID                                        
,NET_QTY                                  
,ORGANIZATION_ID               
,OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID                 
,PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID                                                                                                                            
,TAX_RECOVERY_RATE             
,TRANSACTION_DATE              
,TRANSACTION_ID        
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE           
,CREATED_BY                  
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_MTL_CONSUMPTION_TRX 
WHERE TRANSACTION_DATE IS NOT NULL

) SMCT
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION SCT
ON SCT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT = SMCT.TRANSACTION_ID 
INNER JOIN  $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_MATERIAL_TRANSACTION NMT
ON SMCT.TRANSACTION_ID=NMT.SK_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_PO_SHIPMENT_DISTRIBUTION  NPOSD
ON SMCT.PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID=NPOSD.SK_PO_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND NPOSD.SS_CD='CG'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII_PREV
ON 	SMCT.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID =NII_PREV.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
AND SMCT.ORGANIZATION_ID = NII_PREV.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT    
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ACCTS_PYBL_VNDR_SITE_PRTY NAPVSP
ON SMCT.OWNING_ORGANIZATION_ID = NAPVSP.SK_VENDOR_SITE_ID_INT  
AND NAPVSP.SS_CODE='CG' 
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCWP 
ON NCWP.BK_EMPLOYEE_ID=CAST(SMCT.CREATED_BY AS VARCHAR(30)) 
LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EV_N_GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT ENGLA
ON	ENGLA.CODE_COMBINATION_ID=SMCT.ACCRUAL_ACCOUNT_ID
AND ENGLA.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION NCT
ON NCT.CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY= SCT.CONSUMPTION_TRANSACTION_KEY
